Intro_text:
Welcome to the reward and subjective well-being task!

In this experiment, you will have the opportunity to earn money by playing a decision-making task. You will also be asked to rate your happiness at various points as you progress through the task.
In the next few steps, we will guide you through the task and how it works, you will then do a minimum of 10 practice trials, and finally, you will start the task.

On each trial, you will have the opportunity to earn money. You will be presented with two options: one option will be a certain reward, the other, a gamble.  The gamble probability will be indicated by the percentage number. The gamble has two possible outcomes: either you win and gain the indicated reward, either you lose and earn $0.
